'Extract'. ( ) Container Click/Tap Icon PC : w.24 x h.24px Right-aligned Format: SVG Click/Tap Interaction Collapses the panel to the right edge of the viewport. (Fig.1) Container Click/Drag Color: #8F8F8 F Size: w. 4px x h. flexible Corner Radius: 4px Handle Tab Fill Color: #2189FF Font: Samsung One 700, 10pt, #FFFFFF, Left-aligned Font & Icon Drop Shadow: X: 0, Y: 0, Blur: 3, Spread: 0, Color: #000000 (Opacity: 72%) Icon: Size: Default State w.8 x h.8px, Collapsed State w.16 x h.16px Format: SVG Color: #FFFFFF Left-aligned Vertical Indicator Size: w. 4px x h. 100% of the panel height Color: #2189FF Visual States Default State: Displays a star icon alongside the text "AI Assistant". Collapsed State: Transforms into a side tab with a left-facing arrow when the panel is collapsed. (Fig .1) Resize Behavior: Dragging left expands the panel width up to Viewport width minus 360px (capped at a maximum of 960px). This action is disabled if the calculated available width is less than the default chat panel width of 360px. Dragging right beyond the 360px default threshold instantly collapses the panel

Handle Click/Drag Dragging right beyond the 360px default threshold instantly collapses the panel. Drag from Collapsed: Releasing the handle under 360px snaps the panel to the Default State (360px), while releasing it beyond 360px retains the exact dropped width. Click from Collapsed: Clicking the narrow side tab instantly re-opens the chat panel to its Default State (360px). Minimize Interaction Dragging the side handle to the right edge of the viewport collapses the chat panel. Accessibility Specifications Focus Control & Handle Access Panel Open: The C5.0 Handle is excluded from keyboard and screen reader access. Apply disabled and aria-hidden="true" to prevent redundant focus. Panel Closed: The C5.0 Handle becomes accessible to allow users to open the panel. Remove disabled and aria-hidden attributes. Global Tab Order Keyboard navigation must follow this logical sequence: Global GNB Area -> AI Chat Panel (or C5.0 Handle if collapsed) -> Main Content (Landing Page). No Focus Trap Since the side panel does not employ a background dimming effect (non-modal), the keyboard focus must NOT be trapped inside the panel. Once a user tabs through the last interactive element within the panel, the focus must naturally proceed to the landing page's main content, and the panel must remain open without closing against the user's intent. Reflow & Text Scaling The internal layout must utilize flexible grid/flexbox structures. If a user applies up to 200% text scaling via browser settings, the panel layout must adapt without causing text truncation, overlap, or requiring horizontal scrolling. Gradient Page Load Visual Properties Size: w. 100% of Chat Panel width (360~600px) x h. 40px Style: Linear Gradient (Top to Bottom) 0%: #FFFFFF (Opacity 0%), 100%: #FFFFFF (Opacity 100%) Anchored immediately above the search bar area. match.global_name: - Non Logged-In Users Modal Popup Container
match.desc: - Container - Page Load The modal pop-up promotionally delivers the benefits of logging in to non logged-in users, to encourage login conversion. [Display Logic] The pop-up is shown only once per session, strictly for promotional purposes, and will not appear again within the same session. [Trigger] The pop-up appears once, when a non logged-in user first enters the AI Assistant landing page within the session. [Recommended Questions] (Fig. 1) Unlike logged-in users, non-logged-in users do not have associated customer data. Therefore, three preset recommended questions—one for each target business unit (MX, VD, and DA)—are displayed by default. Note: Refer to PRD Section 9 for detailed scenario definitions. Text Page Load Session Timeout Policy The chat session automatically closes after 30 minutes of user inactivity. A session timeout reminder message is triggered after 25 minutes of user inactivity, 5 minutes before the session automatically closes. The inactivity timer resets on user message submission. Display Rules The message is generated in the ongoing chat stream regardless of whether the chat panel/modal is currently open or minimized. If the chat is minimized when triggered, the user will see this message as the latest chat message upon reopening the chat. Font PC/MO : Samsung One 400, 14pt, #000000 Use Samsung One 700, 14pt, #000000 for the time indicator text (e.g., close in 5 minutes) Left-aligned

Icon Page Load Upon successful feedback survey submission, a success message is displayed at the bottom of the session-expired chat screen. Icon Size : w. 32 x h. 32 px Format : SVG Font PC/MO : Samsung One 400, 14pt, #000000 Left-aligned

Text Page Load When a non-logged-in user's query requires a login CTA based on system logic, the 'Sign in / Sign up' CTA is displayed within the chat response. Since a modal pop-up for promotional purposes is limited to once per session, the in- chat CTA becomes the primary conversion path for subsequent responses. [Logic] Trigger: The 'Sign in / Sign up' CTA is displayed alongside the response when required by system logic. Layout with Product Card: If a product card is included in the response, the CTA is placed after the product card. (Fig. 4) Frequency Limit: The CTA is displayed up to 2 times within a single session. From the 3rd query that logically requires a login, the CTA will no longer be displayed. (Fig. 5) Post-Login: Upon successful login, the session restarts and the user is redirected to the AI Chat Landing Page. Depending on the specific logic case that triggers the login requirement, a corresponding 'login induction message' is displayed above the CTA. Font PC/MO : Samsung One 400, 12pt, #000000 Left-aligned When clicked/tapped, redirect to Samsung Account Page for sign in/sign up.

Button Click/Tap Interaction The FAB appears when the user scrolls up from the bottom of the chat view. It disappears when the user reaches the very bottom. Clicking/Tapping the FAB scrolls the view down to the very bottom of the chat.
